Class TouristVisa

java.lang.Object
classes.Application
classes.TouristVisa
public class TouristVisa extends Application
Tourist Visa application class, sub class of application.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Hassan Abdus Salam

      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • TouristVisa

      public TouristVisa(int appliactionNO, LocalDate submissionDate, Applicant applicant, Status status, Officer officer, int durationDays, boolean hotelReservation)
      Constructs a TouristVisa application
      Parameters:
      submissionDate - the submission date
      applicant - the applicant
      status - the current status
      officer - the assigned officer
      durationDays - the intended stay duration in days
      hotelReservation - true if the applicant has a hotel reservation
      appNo - the application number

      Returns:
